recommendations.title: Unicorn Store
recommendations.overview: A woman named Kit moves back to her parent's house, where she receives a mysterious invitation that would fulfill her childhood dreams.

recommendations.title: All Day and a Night
recommendations.overview: While serving life in prison, a young man looks back at the people, the circumstances and the system that set him on the path toward his crime.

recommendations.title: Damaged
recommendations.overview: A Chicago detective travels to Scotland after an emerging serial killer’s crimes match those that he investigated five years earlier, one of which was the crime scene of his murdered girlfriend.

recommendations.title: Arena
recommendations.overview: David Lord finds himself forced into the savage world of a modern gladiatorial arena, where men fight to the death for the entertainment of the online masses.

recommendations.title: The Lady Vanishes
recommendations.overview: On a train headed for England a group of travelers is delayed by an avalanche. Holed up in a hotel in a fictional European country, young Iris befriends elderly Miss Froy. When the train resumes, Iris suffers a bout of unconsciousness and wakes to fi

recommendations.title: Iris
recommendations.overview: IRIS pairs legendary 87-year-old documentarian Albert Maysles with Iris Apfel, the quick-witted, flamboyantly dressed 93-year-old style maven who has had an outsized presence on the New York fashion scene for decades. More than a fashion film, the do

recommendations.title: A Shock to the System
recommendations.overview: When experienced advertising executive Graham Marshall loses out on a promotion to a young man, he goes down in a path of vengeance.

recommendations.title: Hard Eight
recommendations.overview: A stranger mentors a young Reno gambler who weds a hooker and befriends a vulgar casino regular.

recommendations.title: One Eight Seven
recommendations.overview: After surviving a stabbing by a student, teacher Trevor Garfield moves from New York to Los Angeles. There, he resumes teaching as a substitute teacher.

recommendations.title: The Vanishing
recommendations.overview: The boyfriend of an abducted woman never gives up the search as the abductor looks on.
